feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,690Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 3

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 111,680Chapters: 72/?Kudos: 35

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,356Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

entry.title: Faithful and Virtuous Night
entry.summary:
Author: widow_account

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,284Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 63

Summary: When Merlin and Arthur set out to hunt down a monster, a run-in with a sorcerer leaves Arthur under a curse. Darkness lingers on the horizon, and there may be more to the reporters of the beast lingering in the shadows. With rumours of a rebellion mounting, Camelot needs her King. Merlin does what he must. “Arthur,” Merlin said quietly. “I’m your Court Sorcerer.” Arthur’s stomach flipped. The noise of the birds and shifting branches was drowned by a wave of anger ringing in his ears. “Magic,” he spat. Enchantment—that’s what it was. That was why nothing made sense. This Merlin had messed with his mind. Arthur should have known better; he’d trusted so easily. Magic, surely, had poisoned his thoughts. Even now, what dark shadows were playing tricks with his wits?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: wimdsy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,199Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 129

entry.title: Thief of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Isabella100627

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,834Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so it will be for the young warlock arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father a legend. His name... Merlin.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,793Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 50

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: isleofthewesternocean (backintimeforstuff)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,862Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 27

Summary: When Kilgharrah lays waste to Camelot, Prince Arthur's magic is stirred from somewhere deep within him. In amongst the attack, and King Uther's new-found hell-bent rage, Merlin supposes he should have seen it coming that the reverse side of his coin would also be able to wield the power of the Old Religion. 2x13 The Last Dragonlord AU.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 120,809Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 108

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: Eternes Spell
entry.summary:
Author: ReginaRubie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,504Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Magick roused back with a scream so powerful that its waves rippled over the trees, along the streams and above the flat surface of the lake. The Sidhe’s court shook with the sudden burst of power, as staffs shattered and wings crumpled, as their eternal palaces crumbled and collapsed under the pression of it, as magick came alive again with the memory of fire, death and sorrow. A destruction meant to build a new world on the ruins of the old one. Every creature from the smaller to the most mighty felt the ripple of it, heeded its call. Magick is back, the wolves howled, magick is back, the crickets sang and the Druid claves hidden in the forest fell to their knees for Emrys had come. He had come to deliver them of their plague and their ruin. Deliver them of the swords in their back and the blades at their neck, of the fire at their feet. Yet, when Morgause claimed the right to set out and approach Emrys and to bring him back to them to start the campaign to free them all, the ancient crone warned her with blind eyes and overreaching hands, “magick is law and law is magick, you cannot have one without the other” she said “and one cannot be without the other. Are you Law?”

entry.title: Prince Arthur is in Fact, Not a Particularly Fast Runner
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy47

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,250Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of legend. Tales are told and heroes beckoned. Fairy tales tell, as their labels imply, stories of magic, of creatures that fly. With giants and dragons and ogres and elves, and inanimate objects that bitch for themselves. There's romance and danger and plotting of schemes. There's good guys and bad guys and some guys in between. A fairy tale also reveals some sort of truth, the perils of choices we face in our youth. But our story today is different in theme, for our hero had no choice, or so it would seem. It starts with a priestess bestowing a spell of yore. This one's for a baby named Merlin of Ealdor. [Cue Theme Music} AKA: The Ella Enchanted AU that I asked for an decided to make myself.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,766Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.
